parameters.text:
🔍 Analyzing your food photo...

This takes a few seconds. 📸

content.text:
Analyze this food image. Respond ONLY with valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation, no code blocks:
{
  "foods": ["item1", "item2"],
  "estimated_calories": 450,
  "protein_g": 35,
  "carbs_g": 40,
  "fat_g": 12,
  "confidence": "high",
  "health_score": 7,
  "notes": "One sentence about nutritional quality"
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO food_analyses
  (user_id, analyzed_at, food_items, estimated_calories, estimated_macros,
   confidence, raw_ai_response, source)
VALUES ($1, now(), $2::jsonb, $3, $4::jsonb, $5, $6, 'telegram_photo')
RETURNING id

UPDATE daily_logs
SET calories_consumed = COALESCE(calories_consumed, 0) + $1,
    protein_g = COALESCE(protein_g, 0) + $2,
    carbs_g = COALESCE(carbs_g, 0) + $3,
    fat_g = COALESCE(fat_g, 0) + $4
WHERE user_id = $5 AND log_date = CURRENT_DATE
RETURNING calories_consumed, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $('Parse Vision Response').item.json.estimatedCalories,
  $('Parse Vision Response').item.json.proteinG,
  $('Parse Vision Response').item.json.carbsG,
  $('Parse Vision Response').item.json.fatG,
  $('Parse Vision Response').item.json.userId
].join(',') }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO feature_events (user_id, feature_id, event_type, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'food_image_analysis', 'food_analyzed', $2::jsonb)

parameters.text: 📸 The photo was a bit unclear — the estimate may be off. For best results, take photos in good lighting with the food clearly visible on a flat surface.
⚠️ I had trouble reading that photo. Please try again with a clearer image.
